_description: Maps (target, branch_id) -> template_id. Records which blockers contributed to which catalog entry. Used by tools/run_hypothesis_fanout.py to skip already-covered branches.
_format: Flat list of {target, branch_id, template_id, role, verdict_at_time, note}. Append-only; do not delete entries (they record history). Update verdict_at_time when the template's verification re-runs.

entries._comment_refuted_unskip: Yesterday's refuted leaders (lcms br68 and bloaty br595) and their lcms extensions are intentionally NOT in the skip list at n=10. Both branches re-appear in the n=10 candidate set under DIFFERENT framings (bloaty br595 moved from vpc>cmp value_profile loses to vpc>vp I2S loses), warranting fresh agent analysis. The agent will still see the existing refuted templates on disk and can decide to extend or fork. Re-add to this list only if a new template is built and the branch should be excluded from future fan-outs.

cmsio0.c:706 CompatibleTypes ElemCount inequality. Two-slot tag-table pair-relational lookup over the static cmsTagDescriptor table (cmstypes.c:5798): input must supply two distinct tag-sig FOURCCs whose looked-up descriptors share nSupportedTypes but differ on ElemCount. Subject 8 vpc vs vp (n=10) ΔAUC=23.55M, vpc 10/10 vs vp 0/10 (avg blocked 0.05h vs 11.80h, hitcount 111 vs 0). 56s vpc discovery time + low hitcount is qualitatively distinct from i2s_magic_number_gate's single-substitution corroborations (which resolve at ~0h with 100k+ hitcounts) — consistent with a 2-substitution chain across the I2S dictionary. Strict-wins on 2/2 I2S-labeled edges (subject 8 vpc/vp AND subject 5 cmp/naive). Knob: DICT_SIZE ∈ {4,16,64,256}.

Side-B vp: structurally tweaked profile lacking one of 6 required colorant/TRC tags so cmsIsMatrixShaper=F. v2 corroboration #9 TAG-TABLE PRESENCE-TEST CASCADE (n=10, 2026-05-04).

Both VP-equipped fuzzers resolve cleanly; cmplog provides only marginal benefit. Dominant mechanism is VP CMP_MAP gradient finding 'abst' (0x61627374) FOURCC at offset 12 via Hamming-distance bucketing across the 7-arm switch, not I2S one-shot substitution. Was mistakenly added to i2s_magic_number_gate during 2026-05-04 morning's strpres reclassification batch; per-fuzzer audit corrected to vp_gradient_derived_operand. v2 corroboration #12 (cross-target chain depth invariance: switch-case-arm gating).

optimize.c:650 ATOMELEM(use, atom) bit-test on runtime-accumulated mask in BPF optimizer's compute_local_ud. ORIGIN #1 of vp_rescues_i2s_derived_operand template (sister of br736 flex DFA). Pair (vpc, cmp) on value_profile axis. Mechanism: I2S misfires when CMP operand is runtime-derived (literal not in input bytes); VP gradient at the table-lookup CMP retains intermediate-state seeds. Template revised 2026-05-04: bijective XOR design (v1) replaced with DFA state-machine (v2) per user direction — DFA is more faithful to BOTH libpcap origins (br1077 BPF optimizer + br736 flex DFA). Knob KEYWORD_LEN ∈ {1,2,3,5}. n=3. Synthetic sweep pending. SWEEP COMPLETED 2026-05-05: REFUTED. Direction REVERSED at kw1 (cmp wins 12 vs vpc 9), parity at kw2 (~250), both saturate 0 at kw3+. CMP_MAP gradient on a single-CMP-location DFA traversal does not compound — buckets indexed by Hamming distance to 0xFF give only ~6 distinct buckets total, no per-character signal.

savefile.c:512 `if (amt_read != sizeof(magic))` — length-fail trap. Subject 67 vpc 1/3 vs cmp 0/3 (n=3, ΔAUC=69.5M). NEW TEMPLATE. Mechanism: upstream pcap-magic literal CMPs anchor cmp's corpus at size>=4 via I2S splice-back; CMP_MAP gradient at trap CMP retains short descendants for vpc. N_ANCHORS knob ∈ {0,1,4,16}. Distinct from i2s_corpus_pollution (corpus monoculture vs dictionary dilution) and i2s_anchored_seed_deviation_trap (different pair, different rescue mechanism). Synthetic sweep pending. round-14 (2026-05-04). VERDICT REVISED 2026-05-05: from pending → reproduced. Acceptance rule v2 drops the structurally-unreachable "cmp = 0 at D=16" clause and tests only the demonstrable vpc-GAIN mechanism (vpc median strictly increasing, vpc/cmp ratio strictly increasing, cmp bounded, vpc growth factor 21.7x). All 4 revised clauses pass. Mechanism: CMP_MAP gradient retention rescues vpc from I2S-anchor-induced corpus monoculture; cmp stays at libafl random-shrink baseline (~15 crashes/600s, anchor-independent).

scanner.c:3514 case 1 inside flex-generated yylex switch(yy_act). ORIGIN #2 of vp_rescues_i2s_derived_operand template (co-leader with br1077). Flex DFA traversal: gating CMP `yy_chk[base+c] != state` with both operands runtime-derived from yy_chk/yy_base/yy_def/yy_nxt tables. Keyword bytes 'd','s','t' encoded in DFA tables, NOT as compile-time CMP literals → I2S has no useful substitution. Subject 67 vpc 2/3 vs cmp 0/3 (cmplog WORSE than naive 1/3 — I2S anti-helps). Side-A cmplog filterSize=2 + pcap-magic; Side-B vpc filterSize=32 with 'dst'/'snp'/'isis'/'esp' ASCII tokens. Template v2 design (DFA, KEYWORD_LEN knob) is modeled directly on this branch's mechanism. Synthetic sweep pending. SWEEP COMPLETED 2026-05-05: REFUTED. Direction REVERSED at kw1 (cmp wins 12 vs vpc 9), parity at kw2 (~250), both saturate 0 at kw3+. CMP_MAP gradient on a single-CMP-location DFA traversal does not compound — buckets indexed by Hamming distance to 0xFF give only ~6 distinct buckets total, no per-character signal.

bpf_filter.c:191 BPF VM bounds check `sizeof(int16_t) > buflen - k`. Subject 68 vpc 1/3 vs vp 0/3. NEW TEMPLATE i2s_runtime_bound_substitution staged 2026-05-04 (round-14 revisited per user direction). Mechanism: I2S substitutes RUNTIME literal (input length buflen) into bytecode operand bytes via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp{4,8} variable-vs-variable hooks; vp Hamming gradient must close 8*K_WIDTH bits against per-execution-moving comparand. Knob K_WIDTH ∈ {1,2,4,8}. Synthetic sweep pending. SWEEP COMPLETED 2026-05-05: REFUTED. vpc COLLAPSES from 69 at W=1 to 3 at W∈{2,4,8}, matching vp identically (deterministic 3-floor at all 5 trials). Direction reverses at W=1.44→1.0; not divergent. Mechanism: I2SRandReplace requires the LOGGED VALUE to appear in input bytes — runtime buflen does not, so splicing fails for runtime-derived comparands.

gencode.c:841 `if (bpf_optimize(...) == -1)`. Subject 68 vpc 3/3 vs vp 1/3. NEW TEMPLATE i2s_grammar_chain_length staged 2026-05-04. Mechanism: N-slot multi-byte literal chain (BPF-filter parser keywords); vp gradient compounds exponentially across N independent slot CMPs. Side-A vp filterSize=1 (empty); Side-B vpc filterSize=9 with `0=01%4*0` 4-token grammar. Knob CHAIN_LEN ∈ {1,2,4,8} at fixed KEYWORD_LEN=4. Orthogonal complement to i2s_pair_relational_lookup. Synthetic sweep pending. SWEEP COMPLETED 2026-05-05: REFUTED. Direction holds (vpc > vp ~5x at every dose) but ratio FLAT, not divergent in CHAIN_LEN. vp medians 6078/6864/3513/6666 — non-zero and non-monotone. CMP_MAP coverage feedback retains slot-k seeds, decoupling the per-slot gradient costs. V2 SWEEP COMPLETED 2026-05-05: REPRODUCED-V2. AND-accumulator + single-PC slot-check harness eliminates per-slot coverage decoupling. vp = 0 at every CHAIN_LEN across 20 trials; vpc curve geometric-decay 22158/28666/8814/6. vpc/vp ratio infinite at every dose. v1 refutation + v2 reproduction together: chain-length mechanism is real but only synthesizable when per-slot CMPs are not coverage-edged; real-target divergences with chain structure typically fall in the v1-shape regime.

macho.cc:187 `case FAT_CIGAM:` arm of ForEachLoadCommand 5-arm switch on `magic` (MH_MAGIC / MH_MAGIC_64 / MH_CIGAM / MH_CIGAM_64 / FAT_CIGAM). Decisive pair this fan-out: vp>vpc (8/10 vs 2/10 resolved, blocked 2 vs 8, ΔAUC=12738240, p_AUC=0.0002, prob_div=0.60, dur_div=8.75h). REF naive 7/10, cmplog 5/10 — corroborates the I2S-hurts-vpc story (vpc loses to BOTH the vp-augmented sibling and the I2S-only sibling). Side-A vpc-blocking seeds 5/5 carry `cf fa ed fe` (MH_CIGAM_64=0xFEEDFACF) or `ce fa ed fe` (MH_CIGAM=0xFEEDFACE) at offset 0 — vpc's queue is locked into sister-arm bytes (4 alternative I2S dictionary entries `MH_*` competing with the target FAT_CIGAM=0xBEBAFECA). Side-B vp-resolving seeds 5/5 carry `ca fe ba be` at offset 0 — vp's per-arm CMP_MAP Hamming-distance gradient walks each switch arm independently regardless of which dictionary entry I2SRandReplace would sample. Sub-type C (set-membership-deviation) variant: trap `magic == FAT_CIGAM` requires bytes 0..3 to land in singleton valid set {0xBEBAFECA} while K=4 sister-arm I2S dictionary entries pull vpc's roulette toward the OTHER arms. Mechanism is the v8-flavor 'dictionary-pollution-AT-anchor-zone' (trap-region literals are themselves I2S substitution targets). Cross-target_corroboration #2 of i2s_anchored_seed_deviation_trap (after bloaty br595 #1, lcms br67/br71 sub-type C real-target exemplars). The same source switch is mapped to i2s_magic_number_gate as br475 (macho.cc:152 4-way magic disjunction, n=10 #4) under the (cmp, naive, I2S) edge — different pair, different mechanism (Pattern A: I2S helps cmp via per-case CMP visibility), preserving the strict-2-fuzzer rule. n=10 --RB fan-out 2026-05-06 (rep 1/2).
corroboration #8 — Type_LUTA2B_Read boolean stream-read CMP; same lcms ICC pollution context as #2/#4; subject 7 vpc 9/10 vs cmp 3/10

macho.cc:187 `case FAT_CIGAM:` arm of ForEachLoadCommand 5-arm switch on uint32_t magic (Pattern A view of the same line). SISTER ARM of br475 (line 154 `case MH_MAGIC:`, corroboration #4) and br474 (line 618 disjunction-form, corroboration #1) in SAME source file. cmplog>naive I2S edge: cmplog 10/10 resolved (avg blocked 0.05h, hitcount 1752) vs naive 0/10 (7/10 blocked at 9.50h, 3/10 unreached). prob_div=1.00 dur_div=9.45h hit_div=1752; ΔAUC=11951640 p_AUC=0.0002 ΔFinal=476.4. Side-A naive `ca fe ba be` (FAT_CIGAM); Side-B cmplog `cf fa ed fe`/`ce fa ed fe` (MH_MAGIC_64/MH_MAGIC) at offset 0–3 — I2S dictionary holds all 5 sparse 32-bit case-literals; cmplog substitutes any one in O(1) while naive needs 1/2^32 random matches. NOTE: same source line (macho.cc:187, FAT_CIGAM) is also mapped to i2s_anchored_seed_deviation_trap as the adjacent br457 entry under the (vp, vpc, I2S) edge — different pair, different mechanism. Under (cmp, naive) the K=4 sister-arm dictionary entries HELP cmp (any of the 5 substitutions flips off FAT_CIGAM, which is the F-branch target); under (vp, vpc) the same K=4 entries HURT vpc (roulette dilutes substitutions away from the singleton FAT_CIGAM target). Both views are valid one-tech-delta attributions on disjoint pairs. Per-CMP knob MAGIC_BYTES=4. Mutation lineage Side-B carries TokenReplace + WordInterestingMutator. Corroboration #57. n=10 BR-- fan-out 2026-05-06 (rep 1/11).

cmsplugin.c:444 _cmsReadTypeBase `if (io->Read(io, &Base, sizeof(_cmsTagBase), 1) != 1)` — boolean stream-read failure at the GENERIC type-base reader (called from 3 sites: cmsio0.c:1694, cmstypes.c:2471, cmstypes.c:3314). FIRST BBR-shape (4-fuzzer synergy) corroboration for i2s_corpus_pollution: BOTH I2S-delta (vpc 10/10 vs vp 0/10, ΔAUC=23.55M, p=0.0002) AND value_profile-delta (vpc 10/10 vs cmp 2/10, ΔAUC=11.49M, p=0.0022) decisive at the SAME branch simultaneously. Side-B vpc seed: 438 bytes (truncated below declared header.size=0x234=564), canonical ICC header anchors (mntr/RGB /XYZ /acsp/APPL) preserved; Side-A losers: 564–571 bytes (matching declared size). Mutation_op trace: BitFlip+ByteInc+BytesRandSet+BitFlip — NO I2SRandReplace, canonical CMP_MAP-gradient signature. Mechanism: upstream FOURCC anchors require I2S to preserve; tag-table sanity check Tag.offset+Tag.size<=HeaderSize requires CMP_MAP gradient to approach; deletion mutations actually shrink file below header.size for Read to fail — only vpc has all three. Joins #8 as second boolean-I/O-failure structural variant; n=10 corroboration #9.

cmsxform.c:1025 `if (cls == cmsSigNamedColorClass)` inside GetXFormColorSpaces() per-profile loop. cmsSigNamedColorClass=0x6E6D636C ('nmcl'). cls=cmsGetDeviceClass(hProfile) returns Icc->DeviceClass — bytewise-bijective copy of input bytes 0x0C-0x0F (ICC profile header `profileClass` field). Pair 1 of 2 decisive pairs: vp>naive (9/10 vs 0/10 resolved, avg blocked 2.00h vs 10.85h, hit 2 vs 0; prob_div=0.90 dur_div=8.85h hit_div=2; subject 6 ΔAUC=5919030 p_AUC=0.0028 ΔFinal=68.8 p_final=0.0002). Side-A naive 5/5 carry 'mntr' (0x6D6E7472=cmsSigDisplayClass) at 0x0c-0x0f — locked-on default seed lineage; Side-B vp seed carries 'nmcl' at 0x0c-0x0f and is 236B (vs 564B Side-A) — NamedColor profile path is shorter, vp's CMP_MAP Hamming gradient walks bytes 0x0c-0x0f from 'mntr' toward 'nmcl' and discovered_at=2842s with QwordAdd/CrossoverReplace/BytesCopy mutations. STEP 1 collapse: SAME mechanism family as the validDeviceClass() 7-arm switch (br65/br63/br62) and the cmsxform.c:1031 sister-line br350 entry on i2s_magic_number_gate — 4-byte FOURCC equality CMP on profile-class signature. NOT a sister arm of the validDeviceClass switch (different function: cmsxform.c GetXFormColorSpaces vs cmsio0.c validDeviceClass) but identical CMP shape and operand source. Under (vp, naive, value_profile) edge VP's per-edge Hamming bucket retains gradient-improving seeds; naive's geometric 1/2^32 random match is below 600s budget. Per-CMP knob MAGIC_BYTES=4. v2 corroboration #16. n=10 B-RB fan-out 2026-05-06.

cmsxform.c:1025 `if (cls == cmsSigNamedColorClass)` (same source line as the vp_gradient_derived_operand entry above; this entry covers Pair 2). Pair 2 of 2 decisive pairs: vp>vpc (9/10 vs 2/10 resolved, blocked 1 vs 8, avg blocked 2.00h vs 10.50h, hit 2 vs 6; prob_div=0.70 dur_div=8.50h hit_div=4; subject 8 ΔAUC=23550300 p_AUC=0.0002 ΔFinal=645.4 p_final=0.0002). Side-A vpc-blocking 5/5 carry 'mntr RGB XYZ ' (0x6D6E7472 0x52474220 0x58595A20) at offsets 0x0c-0x17 — vpc's queue is monocultured into the standard mntrRGB-XYZ ICC profile shape that successfully traverses the upstream FOURCC cascade (acsp magic, valid device class, recognised colorspaces). Side-B vp-resolving seed carries 'nmclcmnc cccccccc' at 0x0c-0x17 — vp's queue drifts away from the locked-on default and the input-length collapses 564B → 236B (NamedColor profile path is shorter). Sub-type B/C variant of i2s_anchored_seed_deviation_trap v6 mechanism: lcms upstream parsers (validDeviceClass 7-arm switch + cmsIsTag tag-table scan + per-tag-type FOURCC dispatch) populate vpc's I2S dictionary with hundreds of 4-byte FOURCC entries; I2SRandReplace burns mutation budget splicing 'mntr'/'XYZ '/'RGB '/'acsp'/'APPL'/etc at every offset, monoculturing vpc's queue toward the dominant 'mntrRGB-XYZ' shape and starving mutations that would diversify offset 0x0c toward the rare 'nmcl' singleton. vp without I2S has no monoculture pressure; CMP_MAP gradient walks each 4-byte CMP independently per edge and the input-length-shrink lineage survives. Cross-target_corroboration #3 of i2s_anchored_seed_deviation_trap v6 (after bloaty br595 #1 sub-type A length-fail and bloaty br457 #2 sub-type C set-membership-deviation). FIRST lcms exemplar of the v6 'queue-monoculture-via-dense-I2S-dictionary' mechanism on a single-arm equality CMP (rather than a multi-arm switch on the same operand). Same source-line under (vp, naive, value_profile) edge maps to vp_gradient_derived_operand v2 (Pair 1 entry above); the two pairs are disjoint one-tech-delta attributions on the same per-branch site — STEP 1 explicitly does NOT collapse to one feature because the two axes (value_profile and I2S) operate on independent fuzzer mechanisms. Per-CMP knob MAGIC_BYTES=4 (same as Pair 1) but the dose-axis for THIS template is N_ARMS_PER_OFFSET / SEED_FEEDBACK_RICHNESS — the count of upstream FOURCC dictionary entries that monoculture vpc's queue. v6 corroboration #3. n=10 B-RB fan-out 2026-05-06 (FIRST B-RB shape rep, only 1 in shape group).
